title: My subscription
subtitle: Current plan, quota usage and estimated monthly billing.

billing.peakBadge: ⚠ Billed on this month's peak: {{peak}} users (currently {{current}})
billing.peakExplanation: Per-user billing uses the highest active-user count recorded during the month — mid-month decreases do not reduce the bill.

peaks.title: 📈 Usage peaks this month
peaks.subtitle: Highest values recorded since the 1st of the month ({{yearMonth}}). These values drive end-of-month billing.

history.title: 📅 Peak history
history.subtitle: Last 12 months of peaks per category. Values represent the maximum reached each month.
history.empty: No history available yet. Previous months' peaks will appear here starting next month.

changePlan.title: 🔀 Change plan
changePlan.subtitle: Send a change request to the platform team. An administrator will review it within 24 business hours.
changePlan.noneAvailable: No other plan is currently available.

forbidden.title: 🔒 This page is reserved for the tenant's primary administrator.
forbidden.subtitle: Contact the primary administrator for any plan or billing question.

quotaBanner.sentenceDanger: of your {{kind}} quota used — you are close to the limit.
quotaBanner.sentenceExceeded: of your {{kind}} quota used — action required to continue operating.

toasts.changeRequested: Your request was sent to the platform team. You will be notified once it is processed.
